plan.description: Read src/stack.ts and identify bugs. The pop() and peek() methods don't handle empty stacks — they should throw an error when the stack is empty.
Fix pop() and peek() to throw an Error when the stack is empty.
Create src/stack.test.ts with tests: push/pop basics, peek, isEmpty, and the new empty-stack error behavior.

assertions.description: pop/peek should throw on empty stack
